documentation.description: The global position resulting from GPS and sensor fusion.

record_types.name: Utm_Global_Position

fields.name: Time
fields.description:
Units: [us]
Time of applicability of position (microseconds since UNIX epoch).

fields.name: Vx
fields.description:
Units: [cm/s]
Ground X speed (latitude, positive north)

fields.name: Vy
fields.description:
Units: [cm/s]
Ground Y speed (longitude, positive east)

fields.name: Vz
fields.description:
Units: [cm/s]
Ground Z speed (altitude, positive down)

fields.name: Update_Rate
fields.description:
Units: [cs]
Time until next update. Set to 0 if unknown or in data driven mode.

fields.name: Flags
fields.description: Bitwise OR combination of the data available flags.
